question.text: Under which regulation of SEBI (Stock Brokers) Regulations, 1992, is the appointment of a Compliance Officer mandated?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 18A of SEBI (Stock Brokers) Regulations, 1992 mandates every stockbroker to appoint a Compliance Officer responsible for monitoring compliance with SEBI Act provisions and for redressal of investors' grievances. **The Trap:** Regulation 14 is under SEBI (Intermediaries) Regulations, 2008 — a different regulation. Regulation 12 deals with compliance reporting obligations under the Intermediaries Regulations. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Two regulations mandate CO appointment: Reg 18A of Stock Brokers Regulations (1992) and Reg 14 of Intermediaries Regulations (2008). Know which applies to which intermediary type.
